creator: webmaster@doghouserepair.com
text:
I am also having the same problem as the OP.  I'm running FreeBSD/amd64 
8.0-BETA2 which is current as of 2-3 days ago.  It appears that no 
traffic is passing over nfe0.

The "media: Ethernet autoselect (none)" line from ifconfig looks suspect 
to me.  Trying to manually set it to 100baseTX/1000baseT 
full/half-duplex didn't help any.  I also tried removing the aliases to 
see if somehow those were causing my problems, but no luck.  The 
interface also failed to work when booting from the 8.0-BETA2 install 
dvd.  The interface is functional in Windows as well as Ubuntu.  Any 
suggestions?

Ryan
